mode_of_action_summary: Combination of nitrogen and phosphorus supports early plant growth, enhances root development, and promotes vegetative vigor. Nitrogen improves chlorophyll formation and leaf growth, while phosphorus strengthens root system and energy transfer in plants.

active_ingredients.name: Nitrogen (N)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Supports vegetative growth and chlorophyll synthesis

active_ingredients.name: Phosphorus (P2O5)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Enhances root development and energy transfer

application_details.method: Apply through foliar spray or irrigation system
application_details.coverage: Ensure even distribution for effective absorption

resistance_management.advantage: Improves plant vigor and root strength
resistance_management.advice: Use as part of balanced fertilization program

multilingual_description.english: Nitrogen and phosphorus fertilizer for strong root development and early plant growth.
multilingual_description.urdu: نائٹروجن اور فاسفورس والی کھاد جو جڑوں کو مضبوط اور پودے کی نشوونما بہتر بناتی ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: نائٹروجن تے فاسفورس والی کھاد جو جڑاں مضبوط تے پودا تیزی نال وڈھاندی اے۔

embedding_text: Sooraj NP fertilizer contains nitrogen and phosphorus and is used for improving root development and early plant growth in crops. It helps correct nutrient deficiencies and boosts vegetative growth.
